label: Transparent snowflake motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a snowflake crystal motif with ice white facets, blue refraction, silver edges, and precise radial geometry, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single detailed snowflake crystal with natural sixfold symmetry, crisp branching arms, transparent icy facets, and subtle blue-silver highlights.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any crystal arm or fine branch.
Lighting/mood: clean winter air, precise component-system mood, sharp crystalline contrast.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no pile of snow, no background weather scene, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Snowflake" derived from the visible transparent snowflake crystal motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from ice white, crystal blue, silver edges, and sixfold snowflake geometry. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snowflake, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, component metric cards, token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, crystal dividers, fine borders, exact component states.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snowflake".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Snowflake design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent snowflake crystal motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve ice white contrast, crystal blue accents, silver edges, sixfold geometry, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snowflake, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: blue ice background, ice-white text, crystal blue primary accents, silver-edge borders, prism cyan focus states, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
